ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "home_games" INTEGER /* Number of home games played */,
  "away_games" INTEGER /* Number of away games played */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "team_color1" TEXT /* Primary team color */,
  "team_color2" TEXT /* Secondary team color */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Team logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season stat entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team ID */,
  "conference_wl" TEXT /* Conference Wins-Losses */,
  "overall_wl" TEXT /* Overall Wins-Losses */,
  "total_pf" INTEGER /* Total Points For */,
  "total_pa" INTEGER /* Total Points Against */,
  "average_pf" REAL /* Average Points For */,
  "average_pa" REAL /* Average Points Against */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of Schedule (SOS) rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was home or away */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, postseason) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (lbs) */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the coach has */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style (e.g., conservative, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who is injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ACL tear) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Projected return date for the player */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standings record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team ID */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position in the conference standings */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team ID */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Points For (PF) */,
  "pa" INTEGER /* Points Against (PA) */,
  "home_pf" INTEGER /* Points For in home games */,
  "away_pf" INTEGER /* Points For in away games */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rivalries" (
  "rivalry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rivalry record */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the rivalry */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the rivalry */,
  "rivalry_name" TEXT /* Name of the rivalry */,
  "rivalry_trophy" TEXT /* Trophy awarded in the rivalry game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivalry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rivalries_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rivalries_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the fan supports */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fan */,
  "loyalty_level" TEXT /* Level of loyalty (e.g., casual, die-hard) */,
  "favorite_player" TEXT /* Favorite player on the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the ticket is for */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number for the ticket */,
  "price" REAL /* Sales price of the ticket */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was sold */,
  "seat_section" TEXT /* Section of the seat (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team ID */,
  "media_outlet" TEXT /* Name of the media outlet covering the team */,
  "coverage_date" TEXT /* Date of the coverage */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., article, interview) */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan engaged in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement activity (e.g., attending game, social media interaction) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_time" TEXT /* Time of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_streaming" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stream */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being streamed */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date of the stream */,
  "stream_time" TEXT /* Time of the stream */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for streaming (e.g., YouTube, ESPN+) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_streaming_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player ID */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
